_comment: Golden baseline for the Kokoro fixture (ops-11). Re-bless after editing fixture.json or an intentional Kokoro weights upgrade: `npm run test:golden-audio -- --bless` on a box with the weights, then commit. `metadata` records the weights SHA + kokoro-onnx version so a model bump is legible (a sample-count mismatch then explains 'you upgraded the model'). `entries` are sample-count/duration per fixture line, asserted within `tolerance`.
